insights.programmer_intent: Programmer intended to check user permissions before granting access
insights.what_actually_happens: Authorization can be escalated because the check trusts client-supplied data or has logical flaws
insights.fix: Never trust client-supplied roles. Verify permissions server-side using the authenticated user's session
